title: OpenLLM Metrics SLO Definition
description: Canonical schema for an LLM-native Service Level Objective. One document = one objective. Multi-tenant by construction: every SLO is scoped to a tenant/team/app triple and may optionally narrow to a single provider or model. The same document feeds Grafana panels (via the dashboard pack) and Prometheus burn-rate alerts (via the recording + alert rule files at platform/slo/prometheus/). Schema version: v1. Breaking changes go to v2; backward-compatible additions extend v1.

id.description: Stable identifier for the SLO. Used as the series identifier in recording rules and as the panel filter in dashboards.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in dashboards and alert notifications.

description.description: Optional long-form description. Rendered in the SLO catalog view.

tenant.description: Tenant the SLO belongs to. Required because every metric, decision, and audit row in OpenLLM Metrics is tenant-scoped.

team.description: Owning team. Used for alert routing and SLO ownership in the console.

app.description: Application the SLO covers. May be a wildcard '*' when the SLO is team-wide across apps.

objective_type.description: Which canonical objective this SLO measures. Each type maps to a fixed SLI expression in platform/slo/prometheus/recording-rules.yaml.

target.description: Target SLO compliance level expressed as a fraction in (0, 1). For latency_p99 and cost_per_call this is the fraction of observations that must meet the per-objective bound; for availability it is the success ratio. Example: 0.999 = three nines.

window.description: Rolling compliance window expressed as a Prometheus duration. Recording rules pre-compute burn over 1h, 6h, 24h, and 3d sub-windows regardless of this value; the window field declares the SLO accounting period (typical: 7d, 30d).

provider.description: Optional provider filter (e.g. 'openai', 'anthropic'). Omit to apply across all providers reachable from this tenant/team/app.

model.description: Optional model filter (e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini'). Omit to apply across all models served under the chosen provider scope.

latency_bound_seconds.description: Required when objective_type is 'latency_p99'. The per-request latency budget; observations above this count as SLO breaches.

cost_bound_usd.description: Required when objective_type is 'cost_per_call'. The per-call USD cost budget; calls above this count as SLO breaches.

version.description: Monotonic version number for this SLO document. Incremented on every edit. Used by the audit ledger to anchor change history.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp the SLO was first authored.

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent edit. Optional on initial author; populated by the console on save.

owner.description: Optional contact (email or Slack handle) for the SLO owner. Surfaced in burn-rate alert annotations.

notification_channels.description: Optional list of notification channel identifiers consumed by F033. The channel IDs themselves are defined in the F033 notification config; the SLO document only references them by name.
